tooltip.text: The children avoided ______  the sleeping moon dragon.
waking
The old wizard recommended ______  the glowing path through the forest.
following
The fairy suggested ______ behind the silver waterfall for the missing dream bottle.
looking
The Evil Queen wanted ______  every dream locked away forever.
to keep
The little elf offered ______  the children repair the Dream Machine.
to help
The two heroes managed ______  to fix the dream machine  before sunrise.
to break
The children remembered ______ the dream fireflies in the Moon Forest.
collecting
Remember ______  the dream bottle after you catch a dream!
to close
The Queen stopped ______ a spell when she heard the children..
casting
The heroes stopped ______  at the glowing river because they heard a strange noise.
to look
The children tried ______  the Dream Machine, but it was too badly damaged.
to repaire
To make the machine work again, the wizard tried ______ a little stardust.
using
